education.institution: The City College of New York
education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
highlights: Graduated Cum Laude
Co-founded BYTE Club - dedicated to building software projects and supporting SWE growth at CCNY
Immersive hands-on learning through Break Through Tech
Applied theoretical knowledge to real-world ML scenarios

projects.name: ASAPP Identifying Relevant Parts of Customer Service Conversation w/NLP Transformers
projects.summary: Develop ML application to analyze customer service conversations using NLP, Pipeline, and Transformers to accurately provide managers answers to salient questions regarding customer service interactions.
highlights: Led team of 5 ML engineers leveraging Python's spaCy, pandas, numPy and scikit-learn libraries to vectorize textual data
Enabled efficient feature processing for customer service analysis

projects.name: WordPress NLP Article Poster w/Google API
projects.summary: Developed Python script to scrape data from Google emails to format into a WordPress blog. Used Google API to pull email articles and summarize text with NLP pipeline using Huggingface transformers.
highlights: Automated content creation workflow
Leveraged Google API and Huggingface transformers for text summarization

experiences.summary: Building type-safe backend infrastructure and tooling for a social platform.
highlights: Built a type-safe mail package in TypeScript, including validation, templating, and delivery
Built a CLI tool to spin up realistic test users on demand, eliminating manual data setup for QA and local dev
Shipped the matching feature end-to-end data model, migration, and REST API
Closed a critical auth gap by implementing full password reset — betterauth extension, mail integration, and frontend flow
Shipped dynamic bio generation into the user API, turning raw interest data into personalized profiles across response formats
Standardized account eligibility checks across protected routes with onboarding-enforcement middleware

experiences.summary: Owning product-facing performance and UX quality across a modern fintech stack.
highlights: Cut critical load times from roughly four seconds to near-instant by introducing targeted caching.
Fixed high-priority UX issues across SwiftUI iOS surfaces and an Express TypeScript backend.
Improved the feel of core user journeys by tightening end-to-end performance and polish.

experiences.summary: Built revenue-driving features and cost-saving infrastructure for an enterprise event platform.
highlights: Reduced per-client Twilio costs by 82% through dependency and messaging optimization work.
Rewrote client cost-tracking webhooks to unlock clearer financial reporting for 2,000+ clients.
Launched a CRUD guest-ticketing module used by enterprise customers for registration management.
Delivered mobile and web improvements across React Native, .NET, and Next.js products.

experiences.summary: Completed intensive mentorship focused on interview performance and software engineering growth.
highlights: Improved coding interview outcomes through one-on-one mentorship with Google software engineers.
Strengthened problem-solving speed, communication, and interview readiness in a structured program.

experiences.summary: Led backend delivery while helping steer product, mobile, and deployment work for a startup MVP.
highlights: Managed weekly sprints while supporting a React Native app aimed at 1,000+ potential users.
Built and tested a Go Fiber backend covering authentication and data-management workflows.
Shipped 15+ features across Next.js and React Native while improving release velocity.
Shortened deployment time by 75% with GitHub Actions, Docker, Linux services, and AWS EC2.

experiences.summary: Supported internal public-sector software with reliability, security, and automation improvements.
highlights: Mitigated security risks across critical C# and Visual Basic .NET applications.
Built an automated C# email service that reduced missed project deadlines by 75%.
Refactored a .NET web application to improve stability and cut crash rates for daily users.
Normalized MySQL schemas to improve key query performance by more than 30%.

experiences.summary: Worked on recommendation logic and product communication in an early-stage startup setting.
highlights: Engineered a friend-recommendation approach using preference weighting, embeddings, and neural models.
Bridged technical work with business context to help the team and CEO align on product decisions.

experiences.summary: Built a computer-vision pipeline for irregular botanical specimen classification.
highlights: Fine-tuned an image-classification workflow that reached 97% accuracy in a Kaggle competition.
Explored a wide range of Python computer-vision libraries and techniques for the project.

experiences.summary: Applied natural-language processing to customer-support classification and completed an AI fellowship cohort.
highlights: Classified salient customer-service interactions with pandas, scikit-learn, and Bayesian optimization to reach an 84% F1 score.
Trained classification and regression NLP models in weekly sprint-based fellowship work.
Built stronger experimentation habits around data prep, model evaluation, and collaboration.

experiences.summary: Expanded full-stack and AI application work through fellowship projects and shipped prototypes.
highlights: Served outfit recommendations through a MongoDB-backed REST API built with Express.
Reduced hallucinations in an academic-text assistant through reranking, rewriting, and sentence-windowing techniques.
Deployed a Python Streamlit prototype to Hugging Face Spaces.
